ResizeInstanceBySpec.action: Operation to perform on the instance; current valid value: resize
ResizeInstanceBySpec.enableJumboFrame: Whether to enable Jumbo Frame for the instance: true to enable, false to disable. Defaults to empty. When empty: Jumbo Frame is not enabled when resizing to a spec that does not support it; Jumbo Frame is not enabled when resizing from a non-supporting to a supporting spec; when resizing between specs that both support Jumbo Frame, the setting follows the pre-resize state.
